title: peristrophe japonica var. subrotunda
intro: Peristrophe japonica var. subrotunda, also known as Japanese rosy peristrophe or subrotunda peristrophe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Peristrophe japonica var. subrotunda include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and balance the body's energy.
